chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3224 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.13928/2025 3. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 Mr. Usman Alam advocate holds brief for Mr. Jawaid Farooqui, advocate for the petitioner Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent On the last date brief was held on behalf of petitioner’s counsel and adjournment was sought. Despite fixed date having been given same is the case today. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
